@lsm5 is there a way to mark tests as ok to fail? the integration coverage tests are currently failing, but that's ok because we were not running them anyway in the past (🤷🏻) and to cover for 80% or more tests it will require a separate PR.

Edit: I am also rebasing into a single commit since now I'd like to enable fedora-stable only.

> @lsm5 is there a way to mark tests as ok to fail? the integration coverage tests are currently failing, but that's ok because we were not running them anyway in the past (🤷🏻) and to cover for 80% or more tests it will require a separate PR.

Not that I know of. I had requested something like `neutral status` buttons for packit tests, but don't think that's available or even planned yet.

Is it possible to include only those tests that pass in this PR and leave the rest for followup?
> 
> Edit: I am also rebasing into a single commit since now I'd like to enable fedora-stable only.

SGTM.
